name: standards-refresh.sh forces applies_to_prose true on rules from an html-anchor source and auto-attaches the architectural-content bundle
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r24-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/out && cat > $OUT/s.html <<'HTML'

Doc

Rule one

prose one.

HTML cat > $OUT/reg.yaml <e.err; T=$OUT/out/european-union/r24-src.yaml; [ -f $T ] && grep -q 'applies_to_prose: true' $T && grep -q 'bundle: architectural-content' $T && echo html-source-yields-prose-rules-with-bundle 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
